\tzpentry{ID4393}{Current Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4393 introduces Current Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \frac{\partial \mathcal{J}}{\partial \theta_j} &= 2 \sum_{p \in \mathcal{P}} w_p \int\!\!\int \mathrm{Re} \left[ \bigl( K_p(x_1,x_2;\bm{\theta}) - K_p^{\mathrm{target}}(x_1,x_2) \bigr)^\ast \frac{\partial K_p(x_1,x_2;\bm{\theta})}{\partial \theta_j} \right] \mathrm{d}x_1\mathrm{d}x_2. \end{align}
